ValidationRule.description: validation to not allow the claim status change to Approved if the Approved Claim amount is above the Threshold Claim Amount set on the Lease.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR ( ISBLANK (leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__r.leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Threshold_Claim_Amount__c), leaseworks__Approved_Claim_Amount__c > leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__r.leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Threshold_Claim_Amount__c ), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Claim_Status__c), AND( !ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(leaseworks__Claim_Status__c),"CTO Sign-off"), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Claim_Status__c,"Approved") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Claim cannot be 'Approved', CTO approval is required. The Approved Claim Amount is above the Threshold Claim Amount set on the Lease
